overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The scene features towering skyscrapers with digital billboards, glowing street furniture, and light pedestrian and vehicle traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city intersection with neon-lit crosswalk

events.description: character begins walking forward from standing position at crosswalk
character turns left onto the sidewalk along the main street

agents.ego_description: character begins walking across the neon-lit crosswalk and turns left onto the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with red hair walks across the crosswalk in front of the camera

entered.detail: tall building with 'WILD' neon signage and teal glass facade
dark glass skyscraper with illuminated windows
building with purple and cyan neon strip lighting along roofline
futuristic illuminated bollards with cyan light strips

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a futuristic city intersection at night, with the character standing on a yellow-striped crosswalk. The 'WILD' hotel building dominates the right side with its teal glass and neon signage. The character begins walking, crossing paths with a red-haired pedestrian, then turns left onto the sidewalk. Glowing street pillars line the left side while towering glass skyscrapers rise in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk along multi-lane street with digital advertising

events.description: large curved digital billboards become prominent on the left building facades

agents.ego_description: character walks steadily along the sidewalk passing illuminated building facades and digital displays

entered.detail: large curved digital screens displaying advertisements on building facade
tall cylindrical structure wrapped with red and digital advertising displays

segments.scene_description: Walking along the concrete sidewalk, the character moves past towering glass buildings illuminated with cyan and purple neon. Large digital billboards appear on the left, displaying animated advertisements. In the distance, a distinctive red cylindrical advertising tower rises above the street, marking the approach to the next intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: intersection approach with underpass and stairway visible ahead

events.description: character crosses the street at the intersection, navigating around vehicles
approaching covered underpass area with illuminated stairway entrance

agents.ego_description: character crosses the street and approaches the underpass entrance with illuminated stairs

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan drives past on the street below the intersection

entered.detail: large building entrance with illuminated stairway and 'MEGABUILDING' signage
covered walkway bridge connecting buildings overhead with glass panels

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection, passing the red advertising tower now on the left. A futuristic sedan drives past on the street below. Ahead, the entrance to a massive megabuilding comes into view, featuring a wide stairway with cyan neon edging and an elevated pedestrian bridge spanning overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian underpass with illuminated stairways and neon trim

events.description: character begins ascending the ramp toward the illuminated stairway
pickup truck drives past on the road to the left of the underpass

agents.ego_description: character walks up the ramp toward the illuminated stairway under the megabuilding

notable_agents.action: pickup truck drives past on the street below the underpass

entered.detail: wide concrete stairway with cyan neon edge lighting leading upward
illuminated 'MEGABUILDING' text signage on the building facade

segments.scene_description: Moving into the semi-covered underpass area, the character ascends a ramp toward a massive stairway illuminated with cyan neon strips. The 'MEGABUILDING' signage glows on the left facade. A pickup truck passes on the street below. The space feels more enclosed as the character approaches the stairway entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with towering digital billboards and full moon visible

events.description: exiting the underpass reveals open sky with full moon visible between towers
approaching massive vertical billboard tower dominating the plaza

agents.ego_description: character walks through the open plaza toward towering digital displays with the moon visible overhead

entered.detail: massive vertical structure covered with multiple large digital advertisement screens displaying various content
full moon visible in night sky between the skyscrapers
trees decorated with string lights along the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Exiting the underpass, the scene opens into a vast plaza with the full moon visible in the sky above. A massive vertical billboard tower dominates the center, covered in giant digital displays. Illuminated trees line the right sidewalk, and the character walks toward the towering advertisements as the megabuilding recedes behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit futuristic city, transitioning from a bustling street intersection toward the imposing entrance of a massive megabuilding. It begins on a yellow-striped crosswalk beneath the teal glass and neon signage of the WILD hotel, where the character walks past a red-haired pedestrian before turning onto a sidewalk lined with glowing pillars. As the character advances along the concrete path, the environment shifts into a corridor of towering glass skyscrapers illuminated by cyan and purple neon, with large animated billboards appearing on the left. The scene then opens up as the camera approaches a distinctive red cylindrical advertising tower, crossing a wide intersection while a futuristic sedan drives past. Finally, the movement leads toward the entrance of a megabuilding, characterized by an elevated pedestrian bridge and a wide stairway accented with cyan neon edging.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a confined, neon-lit underpass into a vast, open-air city plaza under a night sky. It begins as the character ascends a ramp toward a massive stairway accented with cyan neon strips, passing the glowing signage of a megabuilding while a pickup truck drives on the street below. As the character moves up the stairs, the enclosed feeling of the underpass gives way to an expansive urban square. The scene then opens up to reveal a full moon above and a towering vertical billboard covered in giant digital displays that dominates the center of the view. Finally, the camera glides past illuminated trees lining the sidewalk as the character walks toward the towering advertisements and the megabuilding recedes into the distance.
